summary: PR 2520 linked the item translation unit `itmasterhandlaser` by changing its configure entry from `NonMatching` to `Matching` and adding a one-entry `ItemStateTable` definition in `src/melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser.c`. The bot report recorded one new `.data` match for `main/melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser`, with linked code and linked data progress.

key_files.role: Build configuration updated so `melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser.c` is treated as `Matching` instead of `NonMatching`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser.c")

key_files.role: Item source gained the missing `ItemStateTable it_803F9378[]` data definition for the laser item state callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itmasterhandlaser.c adds ItemStateTable it_803F9378[] with Anim/Phys/Coll callbacks
bot_report: one new match for main/melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser .data +16, 0.00% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: A global `ItemStateTable it_803F9378[]` was added with one state entry: state id `0`, `itMasterhandlaser_UnkMotion0_Anim`, `itMasterhandlaser_UnkMotion0_Phys`, and `itMasterhandlaser_UnkMotion0_Coll`.
The automated report recorded one new `.data` match for `main/melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser`, increasing that unit's `.data` from 0.00% to 100.00%.

smart_moves.text: The PR kept the scope narrow: one source data definition plus the corresponding configure classification change.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: only ItemStateTable addition and Matching/NonMatching flip

smart_moves.text: The added table uses existing local callback symbols rather than inventing new helper code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: table entries reference itMasterhandlaser_UnkMotion0_Anim, _Phys, and _Coll

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item object linking, a missing `ItemStateTable` data definition can be the remaining blocker for matching a translation unit's data and enabling the object to be marked `Matching`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changes itmasterhandlaser.c from NonMatching to Matching
bot_report: one new .data match for main/melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser

naming_conventions.text: The global table kept an address-style data name, `it_803F9378`, while callbacks retained the existing item-prefixed names `itMasterhandlaser_UnkMotion0_Anim`, `itMasterhandlaser_UnkMotion0_Phys`, and `itMasterhandlaser_UnkMotion0_Coll`.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Data matching tactic: define the item state table in source with the expected callback order, then flip the object classification to `Matching` after the report confirms the `.data` unit match.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR slice does not include objdiff details or a human explanation, so the exact validation steps beyond the bot report are not available.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Missing item state table can block item TU data matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2520 matched/linked `itmasterhandlaser` by adding `ItemStateTable it_803F9378[]` with the existing Anim/Phys/Coll callbacks and changing `configure.py` from `Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser.c")` to `Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser.c")`. The bot report showed one new `.data` match for `main/melee/it/items/itmasterhandlaser`.
